verificationNotes: Confirm installed content resolves to the authored SKILL.md.
Confirm no local edits exist only in the installed copy.
Confirm frontmatter remains identical to repo-authored source.
Confirm installed copy remains a disposable operational mirror of repo source.
Confirm re-sync path is available if drift is found.

verificationChecks: Resolve every install entry through registry before install.
Verify installed copies against source after install.
Treat drift as reinstall/re-sync issue rather than a reason to edit installed copies.
notes: This install plan covers only first-party authored skills.
The plan is operational guidance, not runtime machine state.
